title: mercurialis tomentosa var. bichei
intro: Mercurialis tomentosa var. bichei, also known as Biche's Mercury or Biche's Spurge, is a plant species within the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) that is native to Europe. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits associated with Mercurialis tomentosa var. bichei include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as potential anti-arthritic and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or tincture, and it may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
